title: GhostREMONT
description: GhostREMONT is a cooperative game mode for Minecraft where you play as employees of a greedy "paranormal environment repair" company. The corporation has cut corners on everything, including your safety, so you'll have to improvise!
body:
### What is GhostREMONT?
You are an engineer sent by the greedy corporation "GhostRemont" to repair a haunted basement. The company has cut all possible corners — no tools, no safety, and no guarantees. Your goal is simple: complete all repair tasks and escape alive before the ghosts of former employees make you join their eternal shift.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e45eae38245b42fd5f647343d8cd11f849373cc3_0.webp)


# Features
**Cooperative Gameplay (2+ players):** Work together to survive. It will make your job easier!

**Solo Gameplay:** Try working ghostly shift alone.

**Two Unique Ghosts:** Face Jimmy, the clumsy follower, and Monique, the aggressive shocker. Each has its own behavior and abilities.

**Repair & Survive Gameplay:** Fix pipes, rewire circuits, normalize servers, and stabilize pressure — all while managing your limited resources and sanity.

**Atmospheric & Humorous:** An interesting blend of horror and dark corporate comedy, delivered through environment and tired dispatcher voice lines.


### Links: [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@NazzyChannel) | [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/pgxw3he)

[Voice Chat in modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)

**For better visual expirience install Optifine mod and BSL shaders (shader settings file included in modpack)**
